struct AuthConfig {
    enabled: bool,
    token: Option<String>,
    api_key: Option<String>,
}

impl AuthConfig {
    fn new(enabled: bool, token: Option<String>, api_key: Option<String>) -> Self {
        Self { enabled, token, api_key }
    }

    fn is_valid(&self) -> bool {
        if self.enabled {
            self.token.is_some() || self.api_key.is_some()
        } else {
            true
        }
    }
}

struct DatabaseConfig {
    use_tls: bool,
    cert_path: Option<String>,
    key_path: Option<String>,
}
